title: Infosys Develops AI Agent for Energy Sector Operations
detailed_summary: Infosys announced that it has developed an AI Agent designed to digitally transform operations in the energy sector. The solution uses Infosys Topaz, Infosys Cobalt, Microsoft Copilot Studio, Azure OpenAI in Foundry Models, and ChatGPT4o. Infosys said the AI Agent uses conversational AI to convert real-time operational data into actionable insights, automate reports, provide predictive insights and early warnings, and improve safety, reliability, efficiency, decision-making, wellbore quality, operational performance, and non-productive time.
